properties.name: vault.host
properties.description: The hostname or IP address of the HashiCorp Vault server

properties.name: vault.scheme
properties.description: The protocol scheme used to connect to the Vault server (default https).

properties.name: vault.port
properties.description: The port number on which the HashiCorp Vault server is listening (default 8200).

properties.name: vault.kv.path
properties.description: The base path for the KV secret engine.

properties.name: vault.kv.backend
properties.description: The name or mount path of the Key/Value (KV) secret engine instance (example : secret).

properties.name: vault.token.users.write
properties.description: The Vault authentication token used for write operations.

properties.name: vault.token.users.read
properties.description: The Vault authentication token used for read operations.
